Senegal Airspace

Airspace

Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Dakar Continental G - GND - FL145 -
Dakar Continental G - FL145 - FL195 With the exception of ATS Routes
Dakar Continental A - FL195 - FL245 -
Dakar Continental UIR A - FL245 - UNLTD -
GOOC

Oceanic

Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Dakar Oceanic G - GND - FL145 -
Dakar Oceanic G - FL145 - FL195 With the exception of ATS Routes
Dakar Oceanic A - FL195 - FL245 -
Dakar Oceanic UIR A - FL245 - UNLTD -
GOOO

SLOP

  • The use of SLOP in Dakar Continental is in compliance with provisions in ICAO Doc. 4444, between flight level FL280 and FL460.
  • The use of SLOP in Dakar Oceanic is in compliance with provisions in ICAO Doc. 4444, between flight level FL280 and UNLTD.

This page is a subsection of the Senegal country page.
